description: Customize the Jolly Lobby Track interface to meet security protocols by changing the field label for the employee/host selection to 'Escort'. Register a new visitor named Viktor Antonov from City 17 Logistics with Eli Vance as the Escort (add the employee if they do not exist). Capture a screenshot of the application window showing the updated label and save it to /home/ga/Desktop/escort_label_verification.png.
